og.title: Software, AI & Automation
og.description: We build your company's digital future

services_list.title: Web Development
services_list.subtitle: Modern applications that drive your business
services_list.description: We create web applications, enterprise systems, and custom platforms with cutting-edge technologies. From corporate sites to complex platforms, every project is built with quality, performance, and security standards.

benefits.title: Custom Applications
benefits.description: Solutions designed specifically for your company's processes and needs, with no template limitations.

benefits.title: High Performance
benefits.description: We optimize every application for maximum speed using best practices and advanced caching.

benefits.title: Guaranteed Scalability
benefits.description: Architectures ready to grow with you, from hundreds to millions of users.

benefits.title: Comprehensive Security
benefits.description: We protect your application with best security practices, robust authentication, and data encryption.

benefits.title: Continuous Integration
benefits.description: We implement CI/CD pipelines ensuring fast, reliable deployments with zero downtime.

benefits.title: Support & Evolution
benefits.description: We support your project post-launch with maintenance, updates, and new features.

faq.question: How long does it take to develop a web application?
faq.answer: Depending on complexity, from 4 weeks for an MVP to 12 weeks for a full platform.

faq.question: Do you offer maintenance after launch?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer continuous maintenance plans including security updates, optimization, and support.

faq.question: Do you work with specific technologies?
faq.answer: We adapt to project needs and can work with your existing tech stack.

faq.question: How do you guarantee code quality?
faq.answer: We follow code review practices, automated testing, CI/CD, and industry standards.

services_list.title: Artificial Intelligence
services_list.subtitle: Intelligent agents that transform your business
services_list.description: We implement AI solutions that automate decisions, optimize processes, and generate real value. From virtual assistants to multi-agent systems, we bring AI to your company.

benefits.title: Custom AI Agents
benefits.description: We create virtual assistants and autonomous agents trained with your business knowledge.

benefits.title: Cognitive Automation
benefits.description: Systems that learn from your data to make decisions and execute actions without human intervention.

benefits.title: Natural Language Processing
benefits.description: Chatbots that understand and respond in natural language, integrated with WhatsApp, web, and internal systems.

benefits.title: Predictive Analytics
benefits.description: Models that anticipate trends, customer behavior, and business patterns.

benefits.title: Existing System Integration
benefits.description: We connect AI with your current tools: CRM, ERP, databases, and APIs.

benefits.title: Intelligent Scalability
benefits.description: Solutions that grow with you, processing from hundreds to millions of requests.

faq.question: Do I need large data volumes for AI?
faq.answer: Not necessarily. We can work with your existing data and use pre-trained models.

faq.question: How is AI integrated with my current systems?
faq.answer: Through APIs and webhooks. AI works as another connector in your tech ecosystem.

faq.question: What problems can AI solve in my company?
faq.answer: From automated customer service to document analysis, fraud detection, and inventory optimization.

faq.question: How do you guarantee model accuracy?
faq.answer: We implement continuous training, validation, and feedback cycles.

services_list.title: Automation
services_list.subtitle: Eliminate repetitive tasks, focus on growth
services_list.description: We automate business processes to eliminate repetitive tasks, reduce errors, and free your team for high-value activities.

benefits.title: Process Automation
benefits.description: We identify and automate repetitive workflows, eliminating bottlenecks.

benefits.title: System Integration
benefits.description: We connect your existing tools and platforms to work together seamlessly.

benefits.title: Smart Orchestration
benefits.description: We coordinate complex tasks involving multiple systems and conditional decisions.

benefits.title: Notifications & Alerts
benefits.description: Monitoring systems that notify about critical events and changes in real time.

benefits.title: Automated Reports
benefits.description: Periodic report generation with live data, no manual intervention.

benefits.title: Operational Scalability
benefits.description: Processes that run 24/7 without supervision, handling growing volumes.

faq.question: What processes can be automated?
faq.answer: Any repetitive, rule-based process: invoicing, reconciliation, reports, notifications, and more.

faq.question: Is automation expensive?
faq.answer: Automation has fast ROI. Most clients recover investment within 3-6 months.

faq.question: Do I need to replace my current systems?
faq.answer: No. Automation integrates with your existing systems.

faq.question: What maintenance does automation require?
faq.answer: Very little. Once implemented, it runs autonomously with periodic adjustments.

services_list.title: Digital Marketing
services_list.subtitle: AI-powered smart campaigns
services_list.description: We boost your digital presence with automated marketing strategies. We generate content, optimize campaigns, and maximize results using AI.

benefits.title: Automated Content
benefits.description: We generate posts and copywriting for social media using AI.

benefits.title: Campaign Optimization
benefits.description: We automatically adjust bids, targeting, and budgets to maximize ROI.

benefits.title: Smart Hashtags
benefits.description: System that analyzes trends and recommends effective hashtags.

benefits.title: Real-time Analytics
benefits.description: Dashboards showing instant performance with actionable recommendations.

benefits.title: Multi-platform
benefits.description: Unified campaign management across Meta, Google, LinkedIn, and more.

benefits.title: Smart Pricing
benefits.description: Algorithms that recommend optimal prices based on demand and competition.

faq.question: How is this different from a traditional agency?
faq.answer: We use AI to automate content creation, optimization, and analysis at lower cost.

faq.question: Which platforms do you work with?
faq.answer: Meta, Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads, TikTok, and more, all from a centralized system.

faq.question: Can I keep control over campaigns?
faq.answer: Yes. You define strategies. AI executes and optimizes under your guidelines.

faq.question: How soon will I see results?
faq.answer: Improvements in the first week. Significant CPA and ROAS results in 2-4 weeks.
